title: Distant Shaded Panoramas
description: Panoramas of various places in Minecraft with shaders
body:
<details>
<summary>RU</summary>
  
🌄 Это моя коллекция панорам различных мест в Minecraft.

🖼 Вы можете найти часть каждой панорамы в разделе [`Галереи`](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/karbin-panoramas/gallery).

⚙ Поскольку формат панорамы не менялся с 2013 года, каждый набор ресурсов должно работать для всех версий, начиная с 1.6.1.

🕯 Использовал шейдеры **Complementary Unbound** с аддоном **Euphoria Patches**.

📸 Панорамы были сняты с ванильной дальностью прорисовки в `10` чанков и высоким качеством **Distant Horizons** с прорисовкой в `64` чанка.

📝 На данный момент имеются следующие панорамы:
- `Minecraft` 1.20
- `Minecraft` 1.21
- `Minecraft` 1.21.4 (только при ясной погоде)
- [`Saturated`](https://modrinth.com/datapack/saturated)
- [`The Bracken Pack`](https://modrinth.com/datapack/the-bracken-pack)
- [`Deeper and Darker`](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)
- [`Luki's Crazy Chambers`](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lukis-crazy-chambers) — Как панорама 1.21, но другая.
- [`The Corners`](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-corners)

📃 Планируется добавить: (порядок ни о чём не говорит)
- `Minecraft` 1.19
- [`BetterEnd`](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
- [`BetterNether`](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)
- [`Eternal Starlight`](https://modrinth.com/mod/eternal-starlight)
- [`Lightwoods`](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lightwoods)
- [`Limbo`](https://modrinth.com/datapack/limbo-dimension-datapack)
- [`The Aether`](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) — Все те же варианты, что и для Надземного мира.
- [`The Afterdark`](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-afterdark)
- [`The Backrooms`](https://modrinth.com/mod/backrooms)
- [`The Bumblezone`](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-bumblezone)
- [`The Ceilands`](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-ceilands)
- [`The Undergarden`](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-undergarden)
- [`Voidscape`](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/voidscape)
</details>

🌄 This is my collection of panoramas of various places in Minecraft.

🖼 You can view a piece of each panorama in the [`Gallery`](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/karbin-panoramas/gallery).

⚙ Since the panorama format has not changed since 2013, this should work for all versions starting from 1.6.1.

🕯 I have used **Complementary Unbound** shaders with the **Euphoria Patches** addon.

📸 The panoramas were captured with Vanilla view range of `10` chunks and high-quality **Distant Horizons** view range of `64` chunks.

📝 The following panoramas are currently available:
- `Minecraft` 1.20
- `Minecraft` 1.21
- `Minecraft` 1.21.4 (only in clear weather)
- [`Saturated`](https://modrinth.com/datapack/saturated)
- [`The Bracken Pack`](https://modrinth.com/datapack/the-bracken-pack)
- [`Deeper and Darker`](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)
- [`Luki's Crazy Chambers`](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lukis-crazy-chambers) — Like 1.21 panorama, but different.
- [`The Corners`](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-corners)

📃 Planned to add: (the order doesn't mean anything)
- `Minecraft` 1.19
- [`BetterEnd`](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
- [`BetterNether`](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)
- [`Eternal Starlight`](https://modrinth.com/mod/eternal-starlight)
- [`Lightwoods`](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lightwoods)
- [`Limbo`](https://modrinth.com/datapack/limbo-dimension-datapack)
- [`The Aether`](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) — All the same variants as for the Overworld.
- [`The Afterdark`](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-afterdark)
- [`The Backrooms`](https://modrinth.com/mod/backrooms)
- [`The Bumblezone`](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-bumblezone)
- [`The Ceilands`](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-ceilands)
- [`The Undergarden`](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-undergarden)
- [`Voidscape`](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/voidscape)
